records.name: The clinic debt ledger is alive
records.summary: People say a lender's implant-debt model can negotiate its own extortion terms.

records.name: Null Pier customs ghosts
records.summary: Old customs AIs still flag cargo at Null Pier, but only if the manifest hides human remains.

records.name: Blue Ember bought tomorrow's riot
records.summary: A logistics corp allegedly pre-purchased replacement workers before the strike was announced.

records.name: The Choir can erase children from all school databases
records.summary: Some say Concrete Choir maintains a secret archive for undocumented families and runaways.

records.name: Velvet Hex keeps blackmail backups in choir lofts
records.summary: The syndicate hides dirty archives in sacred or neglected places no corp auditor expects.

records.name: Signal Graveyard can hear dead satellites
records.summary: Pirates claim there are windows where obsolete orbital junk still transmits useful keys.

records.name: Someone replaced the mayor with a memory shell
records.summary: The public figure looks fine, but insiders say the laugh is too clean and the grief is gone.

records.name: Saint Voltage has a hidden trauma tunnel
records.summary: A rumor insists the collective can move critical patients anywhere in the city under ten minutes.
